OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token of the OpenCTI user representing the connector.

CONNECTOR_NAME.description: The name of the connector as displayed in OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The STIX object types this connector imports. Adjust to match the selected feed (e.g. use 'indicator,identity' for the ioc feed).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level to display. Use debug for troubleshooting.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: ISO 8601 duration defining the interval between connector runs.

THREATLANDSCAPE_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Threat Landscape REST API. Override only if using a custom deployment.

THREATLANDSCAPE_API_KEY.description: API key for authenticating with the Threat Landscape API.

THREATLANDSCAPE_FEED.description: Feed to ingest. 'intelligence' ingests full STIX bundles from both OSINT and darknet sources. 'intelligence-osint' restricts to OSINT only. 'intelligence-darknet' restricts to darknet only. 'ioc' ingests lean actionable indicators from the IOC feed.

THREATLANDSCAPE_IMPORT_SINCE.description: ISO 8601 duration for the initial lookback window on the first run only. Subsequent runs use a sequence cursor and ignore this value.

THREATLANDSCAPE_PAGE_SIZE.description: Number of records fetched per API request.
